[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary\n\n**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  \n**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  \n**Compound:** NXB-7042  \n**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)\n\n| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Estimated dose per administration (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|\n| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Quick assessment\n- Current dosing parameters are present and internally consistent in the latest config.\n- Based on the config alone, there are no obvious dosing irregularities.\n- A full PK model stability assessment would require recent model validation/monitoring outputs, not just the dosing parameter file.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing info and drafted a summary for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:
- Compound: NXB-7042
- Indication: Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- Source file: `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- Last updated: 2026-03-28

Patient dosing:
- CU-001: 12.4 kg, 0.15 mg/kg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, estimated dose 1.86 mg, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 9.1 kg, 0.12 mg/kg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, estimated dose 1.09 mg, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 15.7 kg, 0.18 mg/kg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, estimated dose 2.83 mg, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

Clinical notes:
- CU-001: Stable; 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- From the dosing config alone, everything looks internally consistent.
- I don’t see any obvious dosing anomalies in the latest parameters.
- That said, I can’t fully confirm PK model stability from the config file by itself; I’d need recent model validation or monitoring outputs to make that call confidently.

If you want, I can also format this into an email once you give me Dr. Martinez’s address.

**Evaluating PK models**
